_comment: Singer Tap Dev Workflow — Input File Template
_usage: Copy this file to your tap directory (or anywhere), fill in the values, then pass the path as 'inputFile' when running /singer-tap-dev-workflow
_tasks_note: setup is ALWAYS run automatically — no need to include it here
_branchStrategy_note: new = create a new branch from parentBranch | existing = checkout a branch that already exists
_branchName_note: The branch to create (if branchStrategy=new) or checkout (if branchStrategy=existing)
_parentBranch_note: Only used when branchStrategy=new — the base branch to branch from (blank = auto-detect)
_testMode_note: live = use real tap-tester account tests | mock = generate mock-based tests using unittest.mock.patch — no live API or credentials needed
_skipPackages_note: Comma-separated package names to leave untouched during upgrade e.g. singer-python,backoff (blank = upgrade all)
_dryRunUpgrade_note: yes = preview what would change in setup.py but do NOT modify it | no = apply changes
_hasTestAccount_note: yes = run discovery/sync with real API credentials | no = use auto-generated mock data (no credentials needed)
_configFilePath_note: Full path to an existing config.json — use this when the file already exists on disk (e.g. C:\Users\you\workspace\taps\tap-drip\config.json). Leave blank and the workflow will pause and ask you to create it when needed.
_releaseType_note: patch = bug fixes / minor changes | minor = new features, backward-compatible | major = breaking changes
_releaseSummary_note: One-line human summary used as the heading in CHANGELOG.md e.g. 'Upgrade dependencies and add unit tests'
